issues.title: Support Bedrock to set timeout
issues.body:
Long content will have read timeout.

Bedrock cannot set timeout. I am willing to contribute this function and add timeout setting.

comments.body: This doesn't seem to be working and still times out fast when making calls through bedrock
I am also still seeing this issue
definitely still seeing this issue. When using the BedrockAnthropic3ChatModel it times out at 2 minutes
